case.title: SOMERVILLE MILLING v. WORCESTER NORTH SAV. INSTITUTION

opinion.h1: SOMERVILLE MILLING v. WORCESTER NORTH SAV. INSTITUTION, 358 U.S. 278 (1959)
opinion.h4: SOMERVILLE MILLING CO. ET AL. v. WORCESTER NORTH SAVINGS INSTITUTION. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW HAMPSHIRE. No. 495. Decided January 12, 1959.
opinion.p: The motion to strike the motion to dismiss is denied. The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
